There many ongoing solar energy projects which have been causing quite excitement renewable energy world.
There been much research into solar technology different possible real world applications this technology.
This research finally started bear fruit, companies around world constructing some largest solar power plants ever built, number these huge solar plants sure continue rising upcoming years.
Europe worldwide leader when comes producing solar energy.
majority world's largest solar power plants located Europe, that list recently added when Andasol solar power plant Spain became operational December 2011.
Andasol world's largest solar power plant utilizes over hundred thousand parabolic mirrors form solar thermal collector.
Andasol capable producing megawatts power, which more than enough provide electricity over 500,000 inhabitants.
most important features Andasol, other solar power station, ability down emissions producing clean energy.
Andasol reduce emissions 500,000 tons year which, when combined with other solar power stations, help take huge step drastically reducing atmosphere.
fact, Spain location four largest solar power stations world, some regions Spain already able cover over their energy needs through solar other clean forms energy.
world's other largest solar power stations also located Europe, with them being Waldpolenz Solar Park Germany other located Portugal.
However, Andasol slightly different from rest these solar power stations, rest relies traditional photovoltaic solar panels arranged massive arrays.
biggest criticism these plants that solar arrays cover such vast area land, relatively energy output.
Mojave Desert, like other deserts, ideal location solar power plants climate high number sunny days each year.
This there many solar power plants under construction this area.
There currently nine solar plants running Mojave Desert under combined name Solar Energy Generating Systems SEGS, these plants currently have electricity output around megawatts, which combined makes them largest solar energy producer planet.
However, this nothing compared plants which currently being constructed this California desert.
Google invested $168 million Ivanpah facility which currently under construction should operational sometime 2013.
This plant will utilize world's largest solar thermal towers expected output almost megawatts electricity, which would more than double output SEGS.
While this quite impressive, it's still nothing when compared with Blythe Solar Power Station which currently being built near Riverside, California.
When completed, this solar thermal power station expected produce megawatts electricity, that's almost gigawatt, which would further increase energy generation capabilities SEGS almost gigawatts.
There been much talk increased production solar energy India China.
Both countries have been investing large amount money into solar power plants, there been planning some incredibly large solar plants built these countries.
However, nothing compares plans integrated solar city that planning stages being built Indian state Gujarat.
This project still very much planning stages, been announced whether this solar plant will utilize large solar panel arrays solar thermal collectors, possibly combination two.
However, they currently hoping this plant will able produce gigawatts power (5000 megawatts) which would make produce more than double energy even largest nuclear power plants.
Like India, China some very grand plans their generating clean solar energy.
March 2011, China announced plans construct facilities capable generating over million kilowatts energy, they believe that they will able produce over million kilowatts 2015.
China planning huge solar power stations many more remote areas, they able even come close their goals, then they will away world's leader solar energy production.
biggest power stations that they have announced solar farm that currently under construction Ningxia Autonomous Region.
This plant integrated solar combined cycle station (ISCC), which utilizes solar thermal collectors, also fired turbine increase efficiency.
While this plant truly solar, emissions releases will very minimal.
This solar power station hopes able produce almost megawatts electricity when construction completed 2013.
majority China's solar power stations will most likely ISCCs least utilize solar thermal collectors, China hopes that this plant model which many solar power stations based.
